assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs)' as first culprit to check and mentions 'overly restrictive disruption budgets cause 80% of these stuck upgrade scenarios'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides multiple PDB commands including 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' and 'kubectl describe pdb --all-namespaces'

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes commands like 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector spec.nodeName=NODE_NAME' and 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | grep -i evict'

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Does not mention resource constraints, capacity issues, or pending pods as potential causes of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch command: 'kubectl patch pdb PDB_NAME -n NAMESPACE -p '{"spec":{"maxUnavailable":2}}'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or notification system when eviction is blocked

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides surge upgrade configuration with 'gcloud container node-pools update' command setting '--max-surge=2 --max-unavailable=0'

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Mentions 'custom admission controllers blocking evictions' in the final checklist, which covers webhook issues

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Does not provide specific validation steps or commands to confirm that the fix is working or that the upgrade is proceeding
